channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Death toll in Israel’s Lebanon attacks over 120 as Beirut, south, east hit
item.description: Lebanon's Hezbollah group urges Israelis to evacuate border areas as Israel continues to bomb the country.

item.title: Tehran hit by heavy bombing on day seven of US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: An Al Jazeera correspondent in Tehran describes the bombardment in Iran's capital as more intense than previously seen.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day seven of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: After six days of US-Israeli attacks on Iran, the conflict is escalating as regional tensions rise.

item.title: Iran targets Israeli embassy in Bahrain, Saudi Arabia intercepts missile
item.description: Multiple Gulf nations, Arab states, as well as Turkiye and Azerbaijan are caught in the crosshairs of the war.

item.title: US House joins Senate to vote down war powers resolution
item.description: The US House of Representatives has joined the Senate in killing a war powers resolution for the war in Iran.

item.title: How US sinking of Iranian warship blew hole in Modi’s ‘guardian’ claims
item.description: India sees itself a security provider in the Indian Ocean. On Wednesday, it couldn't save even its own guest.

item.title: Who is Ahmad Vahidi, the IRGC’s new commander?
item.description: Ahmad Vahidi takes command of Iran's Revolutionary Guards as the country battles a devastating US-Israeli assault.

item.title: US says Iran missile attacks down 90% after strikes from B-2 bombers
item.description: The US says B-2 bombers have dropped dozens of 2,000-pound bombs on buried Iranian ballistic missile launchers.

item.title: Iran war live: Military academy among locations hit by US, Israeli attacks
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says 'no reason why we should negotiate', calls Washington untrustworthy.

item.title: Suspected Iranian missile debris ignites fires in central Israel
item.description: Debris from an intercepted Iranian missile has landed near Petach Tikva in central Israel.
